parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the distortion. Lower values are darker and higher values are brighter.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Clipping: Selects the type of clipping. Symmetric results in a bit more compression, sustain, and distortion. Asymmetric results in a bit more clarity and less compression.
